text: You are so smart! Butterfly! Butterfly! Yay! Starfish! Starfish! Yay! Here's another car! Awesome job! How many? One, two, three, four, five. Yay! Five cars. Five cars. What's this? See what? Yeah. What? Dog, yes. What does the dog say? Woof, woof. Good job. I am so proud of you. Now how many?
